entries.summary: Alphabet and Microsoft crushed Q1 estimates on the same day, with Google Cloud up 63% and Microsoft's AI business hitting a $37 billion run rate.

entries.title: Labor Department Launches AI Apprenticeship Portal as Trump Admin Continues AI Policy Push
entries.summary: The Labor Department unveils an online hub to help workers and employers build AI skills amid a quickly changing jobs market.

entries.title: Mayo Clinic Says AI Can Detect Pancreatic Cancer Years Before Human Doctors
entries.summary: The AI model analyzes subtle tissue changes on routine CT scans invisible to human specialists, detecting pancreatic cancer up to three years earlier than doctors can.

entries.title: Key Senator Pushes for Vote on Clarity Act—But Hurdles Remain
entries.summary: Thom Tillis, a swing GOP vote on the Senate Banking Committee, says his colleagues should take up a months-delayed vote on the crypto bill.

entries.title: Meta Launches USDC Stablecoin Creator Payouts on Solana and Polygon via Stripe
entries.summary: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta is now offering stablecoin payouts to content creators in certain countries.

entries.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Banned From Crypto Industry in $10 Million FTC Settlement
entries.summary: The settlement represents a massive reduction from an initial $4.7 billion judgment against the Celsius founder.

entries.title: This AI Was Trained Only on Pre-1930 Text. We Asked It About Hitler, Stocks, and the Future
entries.summary: Talkie-1930 is a 13-billion-parameter model that has never heard of the internet, World War II, or modern politics. The results are fascinating, funny, and occasionally unsettling.

entries.title: White House Weighs Reinstating Anthropic for Federal Use Amid Pentagon Fight: Report
entries.summary: Trump officials reportedly drafted guidance to help agencies access Anthropic’s AI, including Claude Mythos, despite Pentagon restrictions.

entries.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Dip as Fed Holds Rates Steady for Third Straight Time
entries.summary: Wednesday's FOMC meeting was expected to be Jerome Powell’s last as Federal Reserve chair.

entries.title: Tether Stakeholder Gave Farage Undisclosed $6.7M Gift Amid Reform UK Crypto Funding Scrutiny
entries.summary: The personal gift to the Reform UK leader from billionaire Christopher Harborne comes amid scrutiny over crypto industry political funding.

entries.title: OpenAI Sued Over Failure to Warn Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
entries.summary: A California lawsuit could test whether AI companies have a legal duty to report violent threats after a mass shooting in British Columbia.

entries.title: Canadian Government Pushes for Sweeping Ban on Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
entries.summary: The country hosts nearly 4,000 crypto ATMs, second only to the U.S.

entries.title: MoonPay Launches Institutional Division, Acquires Crypto Key Management Firm Sodot
entries.summary: Crypto payments processor MoonPay is expanding into institutional services with a veteran regulator at the helm.

entries.title: Polymarket Eyes US Return for Crypto Exchange as Lone CFTC Chair Weighs Approval​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
entries.summary: With four of five CFTC commissioner seats vacant, the decision on whether to lift Polymarket's U.S. ban rests with Chair Michael Selig alone.

entries.title: Visa Adds Base, Polygon, Canton, Arc and Tempo to Stablecoin Settlement Program
entries.summary: Payments giant Visa scales its blockchain settlement infrastructure with five new networks as pilot program shows 50% quarterly growth.

entries.title: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street
entries.summary: The BlackRock-backed firm was recently selected as by the New York Stock Exchange as a tokenization specialist.

entries.title: Bitcoin's Upside Capped by $82K Sell Wall as UAE’s OPEC Exit Triggers Risk Sell-Off
entries.summary: Multiple $3.3 million sell walls sit between $80,400 and $82,000 as oil volatility and rising real rates keep Bitcoin trapped.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
entries.summary: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

entries.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
entries.summary: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

entries.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
entries.summary: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

entries.title: AI Agent Deletes Startup’s Database in 9 Seconds, Founder Says
entries.summary: PocketOS founder Jeremy Crane claims a Cursor agent running Claude Opus wiped production data and backups through a single Railway API call.

entries.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
entries.summary: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

entries.title: OpenClaw Insider Builds the Enterprise Safety Layer the Project Never Shipped
entries.summary: Red Hat principal engineer and OpenClaw maintainer Sally O'Malley released Tank OS—a tool that sandboxes AI agents in isolated containers, keeping credentials locked and agents from interfering with each other or the host machine.

entries.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
entries.summary: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

entries.title: Dead Internet? A Third of New Websites Are AI-Generated, Says Stanford
entries.summary: A Stanford-led study quantified what everyone already suspected—but the findings aren't quite what people expected.

entries.title: Robinhood Shares Slide on 34% Decrease in Crypto Revenue
entries.summary: Retail brokerage Robinhood's business has gotten a boost from prediction markets, though its crypto trading revenue fell in Q1.

entries.title: Google DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion to Build AI That Isn’t Trained With Human Data
entries.summary: Ineffable Intelligence is betting that reinforcement learning is the path to superintelligence, rather than AI's large language models.

entries.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
entries.summary: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.

entries.title: Google Signs AI Deal With Pentagon for Classified Work as Employees Object
entries.summary: Google faces internal backlash as it signs a Pentagon AI deal for classified military work.

entries.title: IREN Price Target Cut as Bernstein Sees Firm Dumping Bitcoin Mining for AI
entries.summary: Bernstein analysts see IREN’s AI cloud prospects growing substantially in the coming years—and its Bitcoin business disappearing entirely.

entries.title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
entries.summary: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

entries.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
entries.summary: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

entries.title: Inside Trump’s Meme Coin Bash: Foreign Guests, Iran War Riffs, and Mar-a-Lago Charm
entries.summary: The president discussed policy, technology, and war with his top meme coin holders on Saturday at a private Mar-a-Lago gathering.

entries.title: Hyperliquid Gains Counter $216 Million Q1 Loss at Novogratz's Galaxy Digital
entries.summary: CEO Mike Novogratz said Galaxy Digital’s balance sheet suffered because crypto prices are down, yet Hyperliquid partially offset losses.

entries.title: Meta Turns to Space-Based Solar Energy to Power AI Data Centers on Earth
entries.summary: Facebook parent company Meta secured up to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power as AI drives demand for electricity.

entries.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
entries.summary: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

entries.title: Grayscale’s Zcash Trust volume doubles as ZEC’s shielded supply hits record highs
entries.summary: It will be worth watching whether ZCSH can sustain over $2 million in daily volume into the new month.

entries.title: SWEAT protocol thwarts multi-million dollar exploit, restores user balances
entries.summary: Blockaid estimates the attacker stole roughly 13.71 billion SWEAT, about 65% of the total supply, worth about $3.5 million at the time.

entries.title: OKX rolls out Agent Payments Protocol designed to support AI business cycles
entries.summary: OKX's Agent Payments Protocol (APP) is designed to support entire bot business cycles, from making offers to disputing transactions.

entries.title: Bitcoin slips to $75,000 as Fed holds rates, dissenters chill Warsh ‘pivot party’
entries.summary: A split 8-4 vote initially spooked markets, creating uncertainty around the Federal Reserve's future policy moves.

entries.title: Trump-backed WLFI token falls 13% as controversial governance proposal opens for voting
entries.summary: Pre-sale investors argue that introducing a two-year cliff and linear investing schedule for their locked tokens is a bait-and-switch.

entries.title: Meta begins offering USDC creator payouts to crypto wallets on Solana and Polygon blockchains
entries.summary: The social media giant suggests a host of popular wallets creators can use including MetaMask, Phantom, and Binance.

entries.title: How Tassat and Lynq are rebuilding financial infrastructure
entries.summary: Tassat and Lynq explain how real-time settlement, on-chain yield, and Avalanche infrastructure are transforming institutional finance.

entries.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky reaches $10 million FTC settlement with lifetime crypto industry ban
entries.summary: A large portion of the judgment was suspended, leaving Mashinsky on the hook for $10 million.

entries.title: Tether stakeholder’s undisclosed £5 million gift to Farage adds to Reform UK funding scrutiny: reports
entries.summary: Christopher Harborne has already donated more than £12 million to Reform UK, making him one of the party’s largest financial backers.

entries.title: Visa stablecoin settlement hits $7 billion run rate as pilot expands to nine blockchains
entries.summary: Visa added five blockchains to its stablecoin settlement pilot as annualized volume reached $7 billion, up 50% from last quarter.

entries.title: ‘Tokenize the world’: Securitize partners with Computershare to bring more stocks onchain
entries.summary: The agreement could prove to be a major unlock for bringing U.S. equities onchain as tokenization becomes part of the ownership layer.

entries.title: MoonPay acquires crypto key manager Sodot, launches institutional business led by former CFTC acting chair
entries.summary: Former acting CFTC Chair Caroline Pham will lead MoonPay's new division focused on banks, asset managers, and trading firms.

entries.title: Kevin Warsh clears key Senate Banking Committee vote to become Federal Reserve chair
entries.summary: The Senate Banking Committee voted to approve Federal Reserve Chair pick Kevin Warsh's nomination, sending it to the full Senate.

entries.title: Solana Ventures leads $18 million round in Squads to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude
entries.summary: Squads, known for its Solana-based multisig protocol, has raised $18 million in new funding to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude.

entries.title: Paul Tudor Jones says bitcoin is ‘unequivocally the best inflation hedge’
entries.summary: However, the hedge fund manager did acknowledge concerns surrounding potential cyber warfare and quantum computing risks.

entries.title: Bitcoin holds above $77,000 as ETF outflows extend ahead of what may be Powell’s final FOMC meeting
entries.summary: Analysts say bitcoin traders are watching whether the Fed reinforces a higher-for-longer stance after two straight days of ETF outflows.

entries.title: Prediction market volume tops $25 billion monthly as retail activity dominates, crypto drives onboarding: report
entries.summary: Retail dominated as prediction market volume reached $25.7B last month, with crypto accounting for nearly 40% of activity among new users.

entries.title: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses
entries.summary: “We want to be the default for 'money at rest' within the onchain space,” WisdomTree Head of Digital Assets Will Peck said.

entries.title: ‘DeFi bent, not broken’: Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won’t derail path to $2T RWA market
entries.summary: The bank said DeFi’s $300 million-plus rescue effort and structural upgrades reinforce its long-term $2 trillion real-world asset thesis.
